text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has decided to enter the Satsuki
Sho. However, the path ahead is anything but
smooth...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: W-well, what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her aptitude makes for a big hurdle. As soon as
she steps onto turf, her performance drops
significantly.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No good, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can tell something's off when I'm running. Like I
just can't go all out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There isn't much time left before the Satsuki Sho.
We either keep at it and hope for a miracle, or...
choice_data_list: We need to change things up, big time.
We need to change things up, big time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A big change...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What about... Yeah! I think I might have juuust
the thing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa, whoa, whoooa! ♪ Yay!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Suzuka! You too, Trainer! Don't give
me that blank expression. All together now...
Yay! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Uh... Yay?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but... what's all this about again, Smart
Falcon?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I told you to call me Falco! ☆ Don't be so uptight,
Suzuka! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has already achieved great
success on turf. Her dynamic and powerful
runaway style captivates everyone who sees it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's bright idea seems to involve her
somehow, but it's still unclear how this is
helping...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I thought you wanted me to give you some
pointers about running on turf...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's right! ☆ Thank you so much for agreeing to
help. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I love the way you run, Suzuka. That's why I want
you to teach me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy you feel that way, but... why are we at
karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Before we run, I want to get some pointers on
singing from you too. Ehe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! It's not like I'm good at sin—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-you too?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go! L-O-V-E! I love Suzuka! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, after we spend some time learning (?)
singing from Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... I can't believe you made me sing six songs in a row...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thanks for singing for us! ♪ You've got me
sooo emotional! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's why I...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Isn't that Silence Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: That's her! It's Suzuka! Oh my gosh!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, in the flesh! Wow, she's even prettier in
real life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before we know it...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fan A
text_block_list.text: I saw your last race! You were amazing, as usual!

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to watch your next race! And, um... It's
still cold, so make sure you stay warm!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, she's completely surrounded. Suzuka sure is
popular.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...But, it's easy to understand why. Suzuka runs
beautifully, and she sings beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: She's got me starstruck. I just love her!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I bet everyone feels energized just looking at her.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna be like that too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is likely close to what Smart
Falcon has in mind when she imagines a top
Umadol.
choice_data_list: You've got what it takes, Falco.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! I think so too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I can't just stand on the sidelines dreaming!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've got to make it happen with my own two legs!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hi, Suzuka fans! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm the Umadol everyone's talking about, Falco!
And I'm gonna be running in the Satsuki Sho! ♪

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fan A
text_block_list.text: "Falco"? I don't think I've heard of you...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But if you're running in the Satsuki Sho, you must
be pretty good... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, why don't you find out with your own two
eyes? ☆ See you at the racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm always performing on the street too, so drop
by anytime! ♪

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Well, she seems interesting. Maybe I'll look into
her...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. She's really something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Silence Suzuka gives Smart Falcon
some running pointers back at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow! She's so amazing. I'm gonna be just like her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired by Silence Suzuka's singing and running,
Smart Falcon looks to the Satsuki Sho with a fresh
spirit.
